words.definition_vi: gây ra hoặc làm nhanh chóng xảy ra (một sự kiện, tình huống); đẩy nhanh tiến trình
words.definition_en: to cause something to happen suddenly or sooner than expected
words.example_sentence: The economic crisis precipitated a series of political reforms across the nation.

words.definition_vi: vì vậy, do đó; từ đây, từ lúc này (chỉ thời gian); từ nơi này
words.definition_en: for this reason; therefore; from this place or time
words.example_sentence: The government implemented stricter environmental regulations; hence, carbon emissions decreased significantly.

words.definition_vi: có thể quy cho, có thể gán cho (nguyên nhân, lý do); được cho là do
words.definition_en: able to be ascribed or assigned to a particular cause or source
words.example_sentence: The rise in teenage depression is largely attributable to increased social media usage and academic pressure.

words.definition_vi: xét đến, dựa trên, với sự xem xét đến (thông tin, sự kiện mới)
words.definition_en: considering; taking into account; in view of
words.example_sentence: In light of recent scientific evidence, the health ministry revised its dietary guidelines.

words.definition_vi: kết thúc bằng, đạt đỉnh điểm ở; dẫn đến kết quả cuối cùng
words.definition_en: to reach a final or climactic point; to end in a particular way
words.example_sentence: Years of research and development culminated in the launch of a revolutionary medical device.

words.definition_vi: phụ thuộc vào, tùy thuộc vào (điều kiện); có điều kiện là
words.definition_en: dependent on; conditional upon; subject to
words.example_sentence: The success of the project is contingent upon securing adequate funding and skilled personnel.

words.definition_vi: xảy ra sau đó, diễn ra tiếp theo; kế tiếp
words.definition_en: to happen or occur afterward; to follow as a consequence
words.example_sentence: The announcement of the merger sparked investor interest, and a sharp rise in stock prices ensued.

words.definition_vi: dựa trên, có cơ sở là; được xây dựng trên nền tảng
words.definition_en: based on; founded on; dependent on as a basis
words.example_sentence: Modern educational reform is predicated on the belief that every student deserves equal opportunities.

words.definition_vi: bằng cách đó, nhờ vậy, do đó; qua đó
words.definition_en: by that means; as a result of that; in that way
words.example_sentence: The company invested heavily in automation, thereby reducing production costs and increasing efficiency.

words.definition_vi: chứng minh, xác nhận (bằng bằng chứng); làm cho có thực chất
words.definition_en: to provide evidence or proof for; to support with facts
words.example_sentence: The researcher's hypothesis was substantiated by extensive experimental data collected over five years.
